Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: the user wants me to generate 20 open ended questions based on a detailed supply chain description for smartphone manufacturing the process is complex involving multiple countries suppliers logistics and digital systems

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to focus on insights potential issues improvement strategies and decision implications the questions should be thought provoking and not answerable with simple yes no

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I can structure them around key areas supplier dependencies logistics challenges quality control sustainability technology integration risk management and strategic decisions

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Each question should encourage deeper analysis of the process described

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me brainstorm across these dimensions geopolitical risks lead time optimization quality assurance across borders carbon footprint reduction AI ML applications inventory strategies regulatory compliance cost trade offs and future disruptions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The user emphasized no SQL queries so I will avoid technical implementation questions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Instead I will keep them strategic and operational

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The tone should be exploratory inviting reflection on hidden complexities and opportunities
